info.name: Clan of the Psychic Blade
info.description: The Psychic Blade subclass for the Crusader.
info.author: Guzufu

description.p: Project your will onto your blade with powerful psionic magic

In order to best protect the weak and force evil to bend the knee, some Crusaders have chosen to empower themselves through mastering psionics. As such, these Crusaders are able to push their physical gifts and sharpen them with mental quickness to use these new abilities to quash evil wherever it may root itself

element.name: Level 3: Psionic Power
element.description: You harbour a wellspring of psionic energy within yourself. This energy is represented by your Psionic Energy dice, which are each a d6. You have a number of these dice equal to twice your proficiency bonus, and they fuel various psionic powers you have, which are detailed below. Some of your powers expend the Psionic Energy die they use, as specified in a power’s description, and you can’t use a power if it requires you to use a die when your dice are all expended. You regain all your expended Psionic Energy dice when you finish a long rest. In addition, as a bonus action, you can regain one expended Psionic Energy die, but you can’t do so again until you finish a short or long rest. When you reach certain levels in this class, the size of your Psionic Energy dice increases: at 5th level (d8), 11th level (d10), and 17th level (d12). The powers below use your Psionic Energy dice. Psionic Interception:As a reaction after a creature within 30 feet of you is targeted with an attack, you can choose to expend one of your Psionic Energy dice, roll it and subtract half of the roll from the attack, potentially causing it to miss. If the attack still hits, then the damage is reduced by the amount rolled.

sheet.description: You can regain 1 expended die as a bonus action once per Short/Long Rest.

After a creature within 30 feet of you is targeted with an attack, you can choose to expend one of your Psionic Energy dice, roll it and subtract half of the roll from the attack, potentially causing it to miss. If the attack still hits, then the damage is reduced by the amount rolled.

You attack a creature within 5 feet using your strength and on a hit, expend one of your psionic energy dice and roll it, the creature takes psychic damage equal to the dice roll plus {{modifier:strength}}.

description.p: You have mastered new ways to use your psionic powers.

sheet.description: When you use your Rallying Cry, all creatures that are affected also gain advantage on their next attack roll that they make.

description.p: You have learnt more runes to empower your journey. You can choose from the two additional options listed or another option avaliable earlier in the subclass. You can change your choice upon gaining a Crusader level.

Your weapon burns with powerful flame. As a bonus action, you imbue the magic of this rune into a weapon that you are holding. For the next minute, attacks made with that weapon deal an additional 1d6 fire damage. In addition, when a creature hit by the weapon move 5 feet or more willingly before the start of your next turn, they take another 1d6 fire damage. This effect lasts for one minute and cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.

sheet.description: For one minute, you imbue the magic of this rune into a weapon that you are holding. Attacks made with that weapon deal an additional 1d6 fire damage. In addition, when a creature hit by the weapon moves 5 feet or more willingly before the start of your next turn, they take another 1d6 fire damage.

description.p: As a bonus action, you empower your armour with the chilling cold of the Frost Giants. When a creature deals damage to you with a melee attack, their movement speed is reduced to 0 until the start of your next turn. This effect lasts for one minute and cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.

sheet.description: For one minute, when a creature deals damage to you with a melee attack, their movement speed is reduced to 0 until the start of your next turn.

description.p: You have become a master of runic magic. You can choose from the two additional options listed or another option avaliable earlier in the subclass. You can change your choice upon gaining a Crusader level.

You empower yourself with the trickery magic of Cloud Giants. As a bonus action, you become a shimmering mirage, making it harder to hit you. Whenever a creature targets you with an attack, roll a d4. On a 4, the attack deals 0 damage to you. This effect lasts for one minute and cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.

sheet.description: For one minute, you become a shimmering mirage, making it harder to hit you. Whenever a creature targets you with an attack, roll a d4. On a 4, the attack deals 0 damage to you.

description.p: As a bonus action, you call upon the power of the storm in a weapon that you are holding. When you hit a creature with a weapon empowered by this rune, they take an additional 1d10 lightning damage. In addition, attacks that they make until the start of your next turn are made at disadvantage. This effect lasts for one minute and cannot be used again until you finish a short or long rest.

sheet.description: For one minute, When you hit a creature with a weapon empowered by this rune, they take an additional 1d10 lightning damage. In addition, attacks that they make until the start of your next turn are made at disadvantage.
